genre_preference.value: comedy, drama, vintage, French New Wave
evidence: "Sometimes I just like a funny, ridiculous movie that make me laugh."
"I love French New Wave film and I love the films of Jean-Luc Godard."
"It's confusing, it jumps around and you rarely know what is going on."
"If you do not like things that seem ambiguous, you won't like this movie."
"Interesting cast. Unusual feel to the story, costumes and sets. Not for everyone but is considered one of the must see cult films."
"The filming is exquisite, is well acted and has an engaging story."

brand_loyalty.value: Terry Gilliam, Wes Anderson, Jean-Luc Godard
evidence: "I love French New Wave film and I love the films of Jean-Luc Godard."
"Beautifully Visual Film. The DVD was crisp and the colors bright and saturated."
"Great to see the comparison. Anyone who enjoys the crisp cinematography, British 60's camera angles and pop colors of 60's cinema will be wowed."
"I liked everything about this peek into the male psyche. Funny, funny, weird and poignant all at the same time."

summary: The user has a strong preference for complex narratives and enjoys films that evoke emotional resonance, particularly in the comedy and drama genres. They show a high sensitivity to production quality and express loyalty to notable directors like Terry Gilliam and Wes Anderson.
